title: Scene State
description: Symbolic, text-serializable snapshot of a ManiSkill scene, given to the planner as the observable world state alongside the instruction. Produced by a state extractor that reads ManiSkill's ground-truth object poses and articulation states. This is the 'x' (query context) the model conditions on; it never sees raw pixels or joint values.

objects.description: All task-relevant entities currently in the scene.

id.description: Unique handle used in skill args, e.g. 'red_cube'.

type.description: Category that constrains which skills are valid on it.

at.description: Id of the surface/receptacle this object currently rests on/in, if any.

reachable.description: Whether the object is within manipulation range from the robot's current base pose.

base_at.description: Named location/object the robot base is currently near.

holding.description: Id of the object currently grasped, or null if the gripper is empty.
